message:
test(fcp-conformance/mesh-authority-wire): pin AuthorityStatus + AuthorityReasonCode + AuthorityRecord/Timeline/View serde wire format (resolves flywheel_connectors-20w4e)

17 tests complementing the existing authority_view_resolution_conformance
(which pins resolution rules) — now pins the SERDE WIRE FORMAT every
audit + persistence consumer depends on.

- AuthorityStatus 3 snake_case variants: active / superseded / expired
  + reject mixed-case / unknown / empty + Copy
- AuthorityReasonCode 9 snake_case variants: active_authority,
  superseded_by_preferred_lease, lease_expired,
  lease_conflict_detected, lease_acquisition_rejected,
  lease_released, lease_not_held, coordinator_selected,
  no_eligible_coordinator + reject mixed-case + Copy
- AuthorityRecord serde roundtrip identity (11 fields) + status +
  reason_code embed as snake_case in JSON + Optional coordinator
  field roundtrips with None
- AuthorityTimelineEvent serde roundtrip + all-None optionals
  (holder, coordinator, fencing_token, expires_at)
- ObservedLeaseAuthority::new field preservation + serde identity
- AuthorityView serde roundtrip + no-active-holder + records+timeline
  carriage
- LeasePurpose 3 snake_case variants (singleton_writer /
  operation_execution / coordinator_election) — cross-check the
  shared planner wire form

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
